data.title: Rare Element Resources Announces Results of Oversubscribed Rights Offering of Common Shares
data.description: In FIRESTONE, Colorado, Rare Element Resources Ltd. (RER) has announced that its recent rights offering for common shares exceeded expectations, bringing in around US$30.9 million in total. The offering, which closed on March 4, 2026, saw an oversubscription from investors. As a result, the additional shares will be distributed proportionally among shareholders who exercised their oversubscription privileges as per the allocation process.

data.title: DPL LLC Announces Launch of Consent Solicitation for its 4.35% Senior Notes due 2029
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Dayton, Ohio, DPL LLC, formerly known as DPL Inc., revealed the beginning of a consent solicitation to modify the indenture governing its existing debt. This move aims to seek approval from investors to make amendments to the agreement. The company initiated this process to address certain clauses in the indenture ahead of a specified date.

data.title: AES Announces Launch of Consent Solicitation for Senior Notes
data.description: A press release on March 5, 2026, announced that The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) has started consent solicitations to modify its indentures. The company is seeking approval from its stakeholders regarding these changes. The AES Corporation, based in Arlington, Virginia, is seeking to make alterations to its agreements through these consent solicitations.

data.title: Methanex releases Q4 2025 financial report.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global unemployment rate has reached 6.5%, with approximately 187 million people currently unemployed worldwide. The study also highlights that youth unemployment remains a major concern, with 13.6% of individuals aged 15-24 without a job. Consequently, policymakers are facing increasing pressure to develop strategies to address this issue and create more opportunities for job seekers. Additionally, the report suggests that the current economic situation may further exacerbate the unemployment crisis in various regions.

data.title: Trigon Metals Announces Results of Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: In Toronto, Trigon Metals Inc. (TSX-V: TM, OTCPK: PNTZF) disclosed the outcomes of its Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders. All proposals presented were endorsed by the shareholders. A notable decision was the approval for a name change to Safi Silver Corp., highlighting the company's shift towards polymetallic silver exploration projects.

data.title: IPALCO Enterprises, Inc. Announces Launch of Consent Solicitation for Senior Notes
data.description: On March 5, 2026, IPALCO Enterprises, Inc. began conducting consent solicitations to modify various indentures. These solicitations aim to amend the terms of the indentures. The company is seeking consent from all bondholders involved. The specific details of the proposed amendments are outlined in the solicitations. This move represents an important step for IPALCO in restructuring its financial obligations. The company encourages all relevant parties to participate in this process.

data.title: Medtronic announces cash dividend for fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026
data.description: In Galway, Ireland, on March 5, 2026, Medtronic plc (NYSE: MDT) announced a cash dividend of $0.71 per ordinary share for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026. This decision was approved by the company's board of directors. The dividend declaration aligns with the organization's previous quarterly distributions.

data.title: OFS Credit Co: Q1 Earnings Insights
data.description: OFS Credit Co (NASDAQ: OCCI) released its first-quarter earnings report on March 5, 2026, at 04:30 PM. The company exceeded its estimated earnings by 6.67%, posting an EPS of $0.32 compared to the expected $0.3. Revenue also saw an increase of $921 thousand compared to the previous year. For more details on the company's past earnings performance, you can find the full story on a financial news website.

data.title: Samsara Stock Surges On Q4 Earnings Surprise, Strong Outlook
data.description: Samsara Inc (NYSE: IOT) saw a surge in shares after reporting better-than-expected earnings for the fourth quarter. The company exceeded analyst estimates with a revenue of $444.30 million compared to the expected $422.26 million. Additionally, their adjusted earnings per share were 18 cents, surpassing the anticipated 13 cents. Total revenue showed a 28% increase year-over-year, with net new annual recurring revenue (ARR) rising by 33% to $144.8 million. Samsara is now considered one of the top performers of the day following these strong financial results. For more detailed information, the full story is on Benzinga.com.

data.title: W&T Offshore, Inc. Declares First Quarter 2026 Dividend
data.description: Houston-based company W&T Offshore, Inc. (NYSE: WTI) recently disclosed the approval and declaration of a quarterly cash dividend of $0.01 per share for the first quarter of 2026. This dividend is set to be paid on March 26, 2026, to stockholders of record as of March 19, 2026. The announcement also mentioned that future dividends and related dates will require approval by the Board of Directors before being confirmed.

data.title: VAALCO Schedules Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Vaalco Energy, Inc. made public today that it will be releasing its earnings report for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, as well as hosting a conference call. The company's stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol EGY and on the LSE under the same symbol. The specifics regarding the earnings release date and the conference call schedule have been disclosed.

data.title: Pokémon Company protests against White House's political memes unauthorized use of intellectual property. Trump admin uses video game content often.
data.description: The company stated that no authorization was given for the utilization of their intellectual assets. The Trump administration has been known to advocate for policies incorporating material from video games on a regular basis.

data.title: Ethereum's push to $2.5K faces obstacles amid bullish market momentum. Find out why in Cointelegraph analysis.
data.description: Throughout the week, the cryptocurrency market experienced a positive trend, with various cryptocurrencies showing gains. However, Ether's attempt to reach $2,500 could potentially face obstacles. Cointelegraph offers insights into the factors that may impede Ether's rally.

data.title: Earnings Breakdown: Allient Q4
data.description: Allient (NASDAQ: ALNT) released its Q4 earnings on Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 04:23 PM. In the report, Allient exceeded estimated earnings by 22.22%, posting an EPS of $0.55 compared to the predicted $0.45. The company saw a revenue increase of $21.34 million compared to the corresponding period last year. Looking back, in the previous quarter, Allient also outperformed on earnings. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Why Smith & Wesson Shares Are Shooting Higher After Q3 Results
data.description: Firearm company Smith & Wesson Brands (NASDAQ: SWBI) disclosed its third-quarter financial results, post-market close on Thursday. The highlights include the stock nearing crucial resistance levels and hitting a new peak. In Q3, Smith & Wesson Brands recorded sales of $135.71 million, marking a 17.1% increase compared to the previous year. This surpassed the $125.59 million consensus estimate from data provided by Benzinga Pro. The company also reported earnings per share of eight cents, surpassing the five cents per share estimate. The company expressed satisfaction with its Q3 performance. For the complete article, kindly refer to Benzinga.com.
